mnemonics: Use the acronym 'SCARF' to remember key resource types: Security tools, Cloud provider docs, Academic papers, Reputable frameworks, and Free online training
keyPoints: Official cloud provider documentation (AWS, Azure, GCP) should be primary resources
NIST Special Publications (e.g., SP 800-144) provide authoritative security guidelines
OWASP Cloud Security resources address common web application vulnerabilities in cloud environments
commonMistakes: Relying solely on unofficial blogs or tutorials without verifying with official documentation
Assuming all cloud providers have identical security implementations and best practices
Overlooking free training resources from cloud providers in favor of paid third-party content
